sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_base58 (encoded String, decoded String);
INSERT INTO test_base58 (encoded, decoded) VALUES ('3dc8KtHrwM', base58Decode('3dc8KtHrwM'));
UPDATE test_base58 SET decoded = base58Decode(encoded) WHERE encoded = '3dc8KtHrwM';
SELECT encoded, base58Decode(encoded) AS decoded FROM test_base58;
